name: 16" x 20" Checkerboard Framed Wall Art - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Geometric Decor, Sawtooth Back
description: The 16" x 20" Checkerboard Framed Wall Art by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee is a digital artwork that features a geometric shape to enhance the visual intrigue of your walls. The checkered patterned image is presented in neutral tones, complementing various background colors in your space. The mat brown frame can be effortlessly hung on walls and doors using the saw tooth mount. It also comes with a glass case for a polished finish. Its vertical canvas design allows for placement on tabletops. Add a touch of geometric allure to your room through this checkerboard framed canvas by Threshold, a collaborative creation with Studio McGee.
